title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a YouTube channel creation system using Claude Fable 5 for automated video editing, combined with script writing, voice recording, and the Higsfield CLI. The approach reverse-engineers successful channels, produces videos for approximately $2 each, and claims to generate $30,000 monthly revenue from faceless or talking-head content.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a YouTube channel system that uses Claude Fable 5 for automated video editing, paired with script writing, voice recording, and the Higsfield CLI. The workflow reverse-engineers successful channels and targets faceless or talking-head content produced at roughly $2 per video. The stated claim is $30,000 in monthly revenue from the setup.
